summary:
Fixed the off-by-one error in pagination.

Change made in app/app.py (list_products):

Old:
    offset = (page - 1) * per_page - (1 if page > 1 else 0)

New:
    offset = (page - 1) * per_page  # zero-based index of first item on page

Running ./test.sh now reports:
PASS: Pagination is correct across page boundaries
